# OneFood

> OneFood is a French nutrition + musculation tracking app with AI-powered photo food logging. Alternative to MyFitnessPal, priced at €14.99/year.

## Pages

- [Home](https://1food.fr/): Features, pricing, FAQ
- [OneFood vs MyFitnessPal](https://1food.fr/onefood-vs-myfitnesspal.html): Detailed comparison, pricing, features
- [Privacy](https://1food.fr/privacy.html): Data handling, RGPD, photo deletion policy
- [Terms](https://1food.fr/terms.html): Legal terms
- [Changelog](https://1food.fr/changelog.html): Release notes

## Key facts

- **Pricing:** €14.99/year annual, €3.99/month monthly. 14-day free trial.
- **Platforms:** Web PWA (all browsers), Android (Capacitor wrapper)
- **Language:** French (fr-FR)
- **Key features:**
  - Photo AI meal logging (Google Gemini Vision)
  - Voice / natural-language meal logging ("I ate a steak and rice")
  - Barcode scanner
  - Macros tracking: protein, carbs, fat, fiber (fiber counted at 2 kcal/g)
  - Gym routine and session tracking
  - Weight tracking with progression charts
  - Supplements tracking
  - Gamified avatar ("créature") that evolves with consistency
  - Meal planner
- **Competitors positioned against:** MyFitnessPal (€95/year), Yazio, Cal AI, Macrofactor, Bitewise
- **Target audience:** French-speaking musculation / fitness enthusiasts aged 20-40, primarily intermediate-level lifters tracking for cut, bulk, or maintenance
- **Differentiators:** Photo AI, gym-focused UX, French food database, 69% cheaper than MyFitnessPal Premium, gamification via evolving avatar
- **Tech stack:** Cloudflare Workers + Pages, Firebase Auth + Firestore, Google Gemini 2.5 Flash for vision, USDA + OpenFoodFacts for nutrition enrichment
- **Privacy:** Photos sent to Gemini for analysis then immediately deleted, never stored. GDPR-compliant. EU servers.
- **Support contact:** contact@1food.fr
